_comment: Known camera specs for seeding anipose calibration. See docs/decisions.md.
_note_1080p_mode: Jabra PanaCast 20 records 1080p via CENTER CROP of the 4K sensor, not 2x downscale. At 4K the full 120-deg HFOV gives fx=1108px; at 1080p center-crop the effective HFOV ~82-deg gives fx~1108px (not 554px). Multiple calibrations show cam1-4 cluster at 865-1120px, cam5 higher (1270px) when Intelligent Zoom is active. expected_fx_1080p updated to 950 (empirical median with zoom off). Lock AI zoom before calibration runs.

jabra_panacast_20.description: Jabra PanaCast 20 — 4K intelligent webcam, 120-deg HFOV; records 1080p via center-crop of 4K sensor (not 2x downscale)
jabra_panacast_20.notes: At 1080p center-crop, effective HFOV ~82-deg, fx~1108px. With Intelligent Zoom (AI framing) active, fx can reach 1400+ and k1 goes positive (pincushion). Lock AI zoom off before calibration for consistent intrinsics. Empirically observed range: 865-1280px across multiple sessions.

jabra_panacast_50.description: Jabra PanaCast 50 — panoramic video bar, 133-deg HFOV (stitched); unreliable for ChArUco calibration
jabra_panacast_50.notes: Panoramic stitched output with highly non-standard distortion. ChArUco detection fails in most frames due to heavy distortion. Use P50 for overview/gaze only; do not rely on it for triangulation accuracy.

camera_name_patterns._comment: Map video file stems (anipose camera names) to model keys. Regex patterns, matched case-insensitively.

camera_overrides._comment: Per-camera setting overrides keyed by substring of the camera name (case-insensitive). Fields listed here replace the model-level value for that specific camera only. Use this when a camera has non-default firmware settings (e.g., Intelligent Zoom active, manual focus locked).

cam5._note: cam5 observed with Intelligent Zoom / AI framing active during March 2026 calibration: fx=1273px, k1=+1.84 (pincushion — indicates digital zoom crop). May also have manual focus locked to a different distance than cam1-4. Tolerances widened accordingly.

cam6._note: cam6 appears to record at full 120-deg HFOV (no center-crop / no digital zoom), giving fx~554-600px matching the full-sensor formula (960/tan(60deg)=554). cam1-5 use center-crop mode (fx 865-1280). May have manual zoom locked to widest setting. Intrinsics transplanted from prior session (0 board frames in March 2026 run). Revisit after dedicated calibration pass.
